prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: KOL-CAMPUTENSILS-HI006 Product Type: FLATWARE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3pc Reusable Backpacking Camping Travel Cutlery Plastic Utensils Set Description: Perfect for camping, backpacking, hiking, trekking and more, the 3 in 1 camping flatware cutlery set comes complete with a knife, fork and spoon, all conveniently attached to a metal carabiner, so you can easily tote the flatware set with you on any outdoor adventure, climbing expedition, off-road picnic, day hike and much more.

Lightweight and easy to pack, the fork, knife and spoon travel set is 100% reusable, making it an environmentally-friendly choice over other disposable plastic items, as you'll be able to use them for many camping and expedition seasons to come.

-an essential item for camping, backpacking, trekking and more
-sturdy and durable plastic construction
-includes metal carabiner for a variety of gear attachment options
100% reusable; an eco-friendly choice over disposable plastic
-lightweight, minimalist and compact design; easily portable
-can also be used for school lunches, on road trips, at picnics or festivals and more

Measuring just six inches in length, the portable flatware camping set is easy to pack in your bug out bag, emergency preparedness tote, survival kit, hiking backpack or keep with your camping gear and camping accessories. Add the ASR Outdoor 3-in-1 Reusable Backpacking Camping Travel Cutlery Plastic Utensils Set to your arsenal of outdoor adventure and expedition equipment, so you never have to miss out on any delicious campfire cooking.

NOTE: Metal carabiner colors may vary Search Terms: travel outdoor forks camping gear backpacking utensils cutlery sets hiking camp stove chef kitchen grill essentials cooking Features: - 3 IN 1 CAMPING UTENSILS SET: Perfect for camping, backpacking, hiking, trekking and more, the 3 in 1 camping flatware cutlery set comes with a knife, fork, spoon that are all attachable to an included metal carabiner, making it easy to pack tote the utensil holder with you on any outdoor wilderness adventure, camping trip, day hike or off road picnic - DURABLE PLASTIC: Made from sturdy plastic, this cutlery set will last you many camping, trekking, backpacking, climbing and outdoor adventure seasons to come; the camping cutlery is lightweight but incredibly durable and will stand up to lots of wear and tear - PORTABLE COMPACT DESIGN: Measuring just 6 inches in length, the compact and portable camping flatware cutlery utensil set is ergonomic and minimalist in design; the spoon, fork and knife are lightweight and won't weigh you or your camping gear or hiking backpack down when you're on the move - ECO-FRIENDLY: The ASR Outdoor plastic camping cutlery set is 100% reusable, making it an environmentally friendly choice over other flimsy disposable cutlery - SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.0389 lbs; Utensils Measure: approximately 6 inches long; Metal Carabiner included with purchase (assorted colors) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3pc Reusable Camping Cutlery Set with Carabiner

tokens.name: Reusable Camping Cutlery Set with Carabiner

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pk Reusable Camping Travel Cutlery Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Includes Knife, Fork, Spoon, Metal Carabiner, Lightweight Portable Design, Eco-Friendly Reusable, Durable Plastic, 6 Inches

openai.title_differentiation: 3-In-1 Knife Fork Spoon Set, Included Metal Carabiner, Durable Plastic, Lightweight, Compact, Reusable
